MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Michael Joseph Vartain, Esq. 346-2155 for defendant UNIVERSITY OF PACIFIC SCHOOL OF DENTISTRY moving for summary judgment/summary adjudication
Philip R. Soderquist, Esq. 291-3198 for Plaintiff and opposing party

Argued and the Court adopted the tentative ruling -- defendant UNIVERSITY OF PACIFIC SCHOOL OF DENTISTRY's motion for summary judgment is denied. Motion for summary adjudication is denied. Triable issue of fact exists re breach of ral agreement.
(JJM/cl) Eric L. Throne, CSR 7855
